proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_cetuximab have different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_cetuximab.
Patients receiving treatment_bevacizumab have different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_bevacizumab.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.
Patients receiving treatment_encorafenib have different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_encorafenib.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib have different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib.
Patients receiving treatment_regorafenib have higher mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_regorafenib.

Mean pfs_months=4.316 (n=5111) vs 4.311 (n=44889); diff=+0.005 months; Welch t-test p=0.873.
Mean pfs_months=4.271 (n=4033) vs 4.315 (n=45967); diff=-0.044 months; Welch t-test p=0.244.
Mean pfs_months=5.089 (n=10022) vs 4.117 (n=39978); diff=+0.972 months; Welch t-test p=1.71e-216.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with kras_mutation=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with kras_mutation=0.
Patients with nras_mutation=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with nras_mutation=0.
Patients with braf_v600e=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with braf_v600e=0.
Patients with msi_high=1 have longer mean pfs_months than patients with msi_high=0.
Patients with her2_amplified=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with her2_amplified=0.
Patients with tp53_mutation=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with tp53_mutation=0.
Patients with pik3ca_mutation=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with pik3ca_mutation=0.

Mean pfs_months=4.526 (n=1506) vs 4.305 (n=48494); diff=+0.221 months; Welch t-test p=7.31e-04.

Mean pfs_months=4.289 (n=3886) vs 4.314 (n=46114); diff=-0.024 months; Welch t-test p=0.528.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with stage_iv=0.
Patients with right_sided_primary=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with right_sided_primary=0.
Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher baseline albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher baseline ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher baseline cea_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months=3.703 (n=27481) vs 5.055 (n=22519); diff=-1.352 months; Welch t-test p=<1e-300.
Mean pfs_months=4.114 (n=17657) vs 4.419 (n=32343); diff=-0.305 months; Welch t-test p=1.04e-49.
OLS pfs_months on ecog_ps (n=50000): coef=-1.1897 months/unit, p=<1e-300.
OLS pfs_months on age_years (n=50000): coef=+0.1765 months/year, p=<1e-300.
OLS pfs_months on albumin_g_dl (n=50000): coef=+0.4654 months per g/dL, p=3.25e-115.
OLS pfs_months on ldh_u_l (n=50000): coef=-0.0003 months per U/L, p=0.0126.
OLS pfs_months on cea_ng_ml (n=50000): coef=-0.0053 months per ng/mL, p=3.13e-17.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with kras_mutation=0, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer mean pfs_months than no cetuximab; among kras_mutation=1 patients there is no benefit (positive interaction term such that the cetuximab effect is more positive in KRAS WT).
The interaction treatment_cetuximab × nras_mutation is non-zero, with cetuximab benefit attenuated in NRAS-mutant patients (negative effect on cetuximab in NRAS-mutant subgroup).

Among RAS wild-type (kras_mutation=0 AND nras_mutation=0), treatment_cetuximab benefits pfs_months more than in RAS-mutant patients (negative cetuximab × ras_wt interaction would imply opposite; we expect positive).

analyses.result_summary: Cetuximab effect within KRAS WT: diff=-0.048 (p=0.122, n_cet=8821). Within KRAS mutant: diff=-0.028 (p=0.376, n_cet=6257). Interaction term coef=+0.0196, p=0.665.
Cetuximab×NRAS interaction coef=-0.0067, p=0.96.
Cetuximab×RAS-WT interaction coef=-0.0169, p=0.707.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction treatment_encorafenib × braf_v600e is positive on pfs_months: encorafenib benefits BRAF V600E mutant patients more than BRAF wild-type.
Within BRAF V600E mutant patients, treatment_encorafenib is associated with longer mean pfs_months than no encorafenib.

analyses.result_summary: Encorafenib×BRAF V600E interaction coef=-0.1413, p=0.376. Within BRAF WT: cet_diff=+0.013 (p=0.718). Within BRAF V600E: enc_diff=-0.129 (p=0.329, n_enc=242).
Within BRAF V600E mutant subgroup (n=2272): mean pfs on encorafenib=3.979 vs off=4.108; diff=-0.129, p=0.329.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction treatment_pembrolizumab × msi_high is positive on pfs_months: pembrolizumab benefits MSI-high patients more than MSS patients.
Within msi_high=1, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer mean pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.

analyses.result_summary: Pembrolizumab×MSI-high interaction coef=+0.0020, p=0.988. Within MSS: pem_diff=+0.005 (p=0.861). Within MSI-H: pem_diff=+0.007 (p=0.957, n_pem=396).
Within MSI-high (n=2513): mean pfs on pem=4.299 vs off=4.292; diff=+0.007, p=0.957.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib × her2_amplified is positive on pfs_months: HER2-directed therapy benefits HER2-amplified patients more than HER2-non-amplified.
Within her2_amplified=1, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is associated with longer mean pfs_months than no HER2-directed therapy.

analyses.result_summary: Trastuzumab+Tucatinib × HER2-amplified interaction coef=+0.0625, p=0.778. Within HER2- patients: trt_diff=-0.046 (p=0.232). Within HER2+: trt_diff=+0.017 (p=0.934, n_trt=120).
Within HER2-amplified subgroup (n=1504): mean pfs on Tras+Tuc=4.273 vs off=4.256; diff=+0.017, p=0.934.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction treatment_cetuximab × right_sided_primary is negative on pfs_months: cetuximab benefits left-sided (right_sided_primary=0) more than right-sided primaries.
Among RAS wild-type left-sided patients, cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than no cetuximab; among RAS wild-type right-sided patients there is no benefit.

analyses.result_summary: Cetuximab × right-sided interaction coef=+0.0256, p=0.583. Within left-sided: cet_diff=-0.049 (p=0.0859). Within right-sided: cet_diff=-0.024 (p=0.49).

analyses.code: ras_wt subgroup, ttest cet by side
analyses.result_summary: In RAS-WT left-sided (n=17924): cet_diff=-0.062, p=0.134. In RAS-WT right-sided (n=9672): cet_diff=-0.035, p=0.443.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher nlr is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months on nlr (n=50000): coef=+0.0052 months per unit, p=0.29.
OLS pfs_months on crp_mg_l (n=50000): coef=-0.0020 months per mg/L, p=0.065.
OLS pfs_months on hemoglobin_g_dl (n=50000): coef=-0.0101 months per g/dL, p=0.0777.
OLS pfs_months on alkaline_phosphatase_u_l (n=50000): coef=-0.0006 months per U/L, p=0.00413.
OLS pfs_months on weight_loss_pct_6mo (n=50000): coef=-0.0730 months per %, p=2.21e-167.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with liver_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with liver_mets=0.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with bone_mets=0.
Patients with adrenal_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with adrenal_mets=0.
Higher count of metastatic sites (sum of liver_mets, bone_mets, adrenal_mets) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months=4.296 (n=7392) vs 4.314 (n=42608); diff=-0.019 months; Welch t-test p=0.519.
Mean pfs_months=4.337 (n=10056) vs 4.305 (n=39944); diff=+0.031 months; Welch t-test p=0.225.

OLS pfs_months on mets_count (n=50000): coef=+0.0208 months per site, p=0.212.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
A composite symptom-burden score (sum of pain_nrs, fatigue_grade, dyspnea_grade, cough_grade, appetite_loss_grade) is negatively associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months on fatigue_grade (n=50000): coef=-0.0017 months/grade, p=0.853.
OLS pfs_months on pain_nrs (n=50000): coef=-0.0023 months/NRS unit, p=0.547.
OLS pfs_months on dyspnea_grade (n=50000): coef=-0.0092 months/grade, p=0.312.
OLS pfs_months on appetite_loss_grade (n=50000): coef=-0.0002 months/grade, p=0.983.
OLS pfs_months on sx_burden (n=50000): coef=-0.0041 months/unit, p=0.162.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs by sex_female (female vs male).
Mean pfs_months differs by rural_residence (rural vs urban).
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher education_years is associated with longer pfs_months (a socioeconomic-status proxy).
Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories.
Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months=4.308 (n=22371) vs 4.314 (n=27629); diff=-0.006 months; Welch t-test p=0.77.
Mean pfs_months=4.331 (n=10073) vs 4.307 (n=39927); diff=+0.024 months; Welch t-test p=0.339.
OLS pfs_months on smoking_pack_years (n=50000): coef=+0.0000 months/pack-year, p=0.913.
OLS pfs_months on education_years (n=50000): coef=+0.0033 months/year, p=0.337.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Carriers of snp_rs1050828=1 have longer mean pfs_months than non-carriers (allelic main effect).
Carriers of snp_rs1801131=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than non-carriers (allelic main effect).
Carriers of snp_rs1801197=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than non-carriers (allelic main effect).
More than 5% of the 27 SNPs (i.e., more than ~1.4) show univariate associations with pfs_months at p<0.05, beyond chance expectation.

analyses.result_summary: 3 of 27 SNPs reach p<0.05 (expected by chance ≈ 1.35); not strikingly enriched.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable OLS controlling for ECOG, age, stage, albumin, LDH, NLR, CRP, RAS, BRAF, MSI-H, HER2-amp, sidedness, liver_mets and other treatments, treatment_regorafenib remains positively associated with pfs_months.

After multivariable adjustment, the canonical biomarker–treatment interactions (cet×kras, enc×braf_v600e, pem×msi_high, trast+tuc×her2_amplified) are statistically significant in the expected directions.
After multivariable adjustment, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, kras_mutation, braf_v600e and right_sided_primary all retain large independent effects on pfs_months.

analyses.code: MV OLS — see formula in result
analyses.result_summary: treatment_regorafenib coef=+0.9392, p=<1e-300 (R²=0.841, n=50000).
cet×kras coef=+0.0199 (p=0.271); enc×braf_v600e coef=-0.0427 (p=0.502); pem×msi coef=+0.0437 (p=0.395); tras+tuc×her2 coef=+0.0007 (p=0.994).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction ecog_ps × treatment_cetuximab is non-zero on pfs_months: cetuximab benefit (or harm) varies with performance status.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months on ecog_ps:treatment_cetuximab (n=50000): coef=+0.0352, p=0.254.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The composite indicator raswt_left_cet (RAS wild-type AND left-sided AND on cetuximab) marks a subgroup with longer pfs_months than the rest of the cohort.
Within the RAS wild-type, left-sided subgroup, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than no cetuximab.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months=4.574 (n=5510) vs 4.279 (n=44490); diff=+0.295 months; Welch t-test p=1.59e-16.

analyses.code: stratified ttest cet within RAS-WT, left-sided
analyses.result_summary: In RAS-WT left-sided: mean pfs on cet=4.574 vs off=4.635; diff=-0.062, p=0.134.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction treatment_bevacizumab × kras_mutation is non-zero on pfs_months.
The interaction treatment_bevacizumab × right_sided_primary is non-zero on pfs_months.
The interaction treatment_bevacizumab × liver_mets is non-zero on pfs_months (anti-VEGF benefit may differ in visceral disease).

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months on treatment_bevacizumab:kras_mutation (n=50000): coef=-0.0044, p=0.915.
OLS pfs_months on treatment_bevacizumab:right_sided_primary (n=50000): coef=-0.0221, p=0.608.
OLS pfs_months on treatment_bevacizumab:liver_mets (n=50000): coef=+0.0025, p=0.966.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction treatment_regorafenib × prior_lines_of_therapy is non-zero: regorafenib effect on pfs_months varies with line of therapy.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months on treatment_regorafenib:prior_lines_of_therapy (n=50000): coef=+0.0159, p=0.477.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction treatment_pembrolizumab × nlr_high (NLR ≥ median) is negative: high baseline NLR diminishes pembrolizumab benefit on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months on treatment_pembrolizumab:nlr_high (n=50000): coef=+0.0773, p=0.175.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After mutual adjustment for all six treatments and key biomarkers and prognostic covariates, treatment_regorafenib remains the only treatment with a robust positive independent effect on pfs_months.

After mutual adjustment, kras_mutation, braf_v600e, ecog_ps, age_years, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, right_sided_primary all retain independent associations with pfs_months in the expected directions; nras_mutation, msi_high, her2_amplified do not.

analyses.code: MV OLS final — biomarker / prognostic terms
